name: Quantum Pro Wireless Headphones
description: Immersive 360° spatial audio with adaptive noise cancellation. 40-hour battery life with rapid charge technology.

name: NovaBand Ultra Smartwatch
description: AMOLED always-on display with titanium body. Advanced health sensors and 14-day battery life.

name: Eclipse 4K Action Camera
description: Shoot 4K 120fps with HyperStabilization. Waterproof to 30m with dual-screen design.

name: AeroCharge MagSafe Pad
description: 15W fast wireless charging with perfect alignment. Aircraft-grade aluminum base with LED indicator.

name: Zenith Mechanical Keyboard
description: Hot-swappable switches with per-key RGB. Gasket-mounted design for a premium typing feel.

name: Pulse Gaming Mouse
description: 26K DPI optical sensor with zero-click latency. Ultra-lightweight 58g design with PTFE glides.

name: Orion Portable SSD 2TB
description: 2000MB/s read speeds with hardware encryption. IP55 dust and water resistant, pocket-sized build.

name: Vortex Noise-Cancelling Earbuds
description: Adaptive ANC with transparency mode. Custom-tuned drivers delivering studio-grade sound quality.

name: Stellar 27" 4K Monitor
description: Nano-IPS panel with 144Hz refresh rate. Factory-calibrated with 98% DCI-P3 coverage.

name: Flux USB-C Hub Pro
description: 12-in-1 connectivity hub with dual HDMI 4K output. 100W pass-through charging with ethernet port.

name: Nebula Smart Speaker
description: 360° room-filling sound with AI voice assistant. Multi-room sync with adaptive EQ technology.

name: Titan Drone Explorer
description: 8K camera with omnidirectional obstacle avoidance. 45-min flight time with intelligent tracking modes.
